name: Jiang Qi
page_title: Jiang Qi 蔣奇 [Yuan Shao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was never sent to reinforce Wu Chao, Yuan Shao rejected the advice to do so.
	Was not killed by Zhang Liao.

sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	蔣奇


	 Pronunciation

	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Jiǎng Jī


	 Wade-Giles 
	Chiang Ch‘i (I-ch‘ü)

	 Name Notes 
	Houhan shu Volume 74, biography of Yuan Shao, features mention of Jiang Yiqu (蔣義渠) and Jiang Qi (蔣奇), who may be the same person.

full_text:
Jiang Qi 蔣奇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Qi (蔣奇). Pushed for Shen Pei to be sacked in favor of Meng Dai. Jiang Qi was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
